name: Chengwen Song
bio: Editor-in-Chief of PoliEcoM Administration Review and Executive Editorial Board Member. Ph.D. candidate in Public Administration, focusing on central government governance, higher education institutions, and psychological mechanisms in organizational behavior.

name: Yang Hu
bio: Specializes in the digital transformation of SMEs, artificial intelligence ethics, international education strategy, and organizational sustainable innovation.

name: Xinhuan Zeng
bio: Co-Editor-in-Chief of GRHAS and Ph.D. candidate focusing on AI motion analysis in dance, digital interactive performance, and expert evaluation methodologies.

name: Qilun Hu
bio: Editor-in-Chief of the Journal of Law, Psychology, and Communication Studies. Researcher focusing on political communication, AIGC, information pollution, and algorithmic recommendation.

name: Xuzhuo Zhang
bio: Editorial Board Member for AI & Future Society. Researcher focusing on digital forensics, federated learning, deep learning frameworks, and ethical parameters in AI-driven investigations.

name: Qin Shi
bio: Editorial Board Member for GRHAS. Award-winning choreographer and researcher focusing on the cultural inheritance, pedagogy, and digital preservation of Chinese ethnic and folk dances.

name: Qilong Wang
bio: Editorial Board Member for Silence and Youth Editorial Board Member for Health Nexus. Researcher specializing in psychiatric epidemiology, geriatric psychiatry, and AI predictive modeling in medical research.

name: Qiong Xie
bio: Editorial Board Member for AI & Future Society. Faculty member specializing in sustainable development management, corporate finance, and financial derivatives, with a focus on SME innovation.
